markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive into Tavus's product to inform GrowthX's content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**The Core Challenge:** Tavus's advanced tech (dynamic turn-taking, perception model) is unknown to the market. Organic search is driven by generic terms like "AI avatar," creating a massive education gap.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
  - [**The Content Mandate:** Educate the market on Tavus's unique capabilities, prove ROI with specific use cases, and build authority as the category leader for real-time conversational video.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)
  - [**The Key Differentiator:** Tavus's proprietary models enable sub-600ms latency with natural turn-taking (no interruptions), dynamic emotional rendering, and perception (seeing/understanding users).](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=1999.0)
  - [**The Implementation Hurdle:** Tavus requires technical resources and advanced prompt engineering. This creates a content opportunity for programmatic guides and a public glossary to simplify the process.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=2660.0)

## Topics

### Tavus Product Overview

  - [**Mission:** Simplify human-machine interaction via conversational video.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)
  - [**Delivery:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
      - [**White-label APIs:** For developers.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
      - [**"PALS":** Out-of-the-box solutions for non-technical users.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
  - [**End-to-End Pipeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)
      - [**Rendering & Lip-Sync:** High-quality visuals.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)
      - [**Turn-Taking:** Context-aware conversation flow.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)
      - [**Perception:** Ability to "see" users via camera or screen share.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)
  - [**Use Cases:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
      - [**Healthcare:** Virtual patient assistants (e.g., Mayo Clinic).](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=3189.0)
      - [**Role-Play:** Mock interviews, sales enablement, doctor training.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)
      - [**Coaching:** Leadership development, L\&D.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)
  - [**Architecture:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
      - [**Avatar/Replica:** The visual interface.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
      - [**Persona:** The "brain" (knowledge, tone, context) that drives the conversation.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)

### Market & Organic Growth Challenge

  - [**Problem:** The market is unaware of Tavus's advanced capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=2545.0)
  - [**Organic Search Behavior:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)
      - [Users search for generic terms ("AI avatar").](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=1792.0)
      - [They discover Tavus's two-way conversational features and have a "mindset shift."](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
  - [**Current Inbound Triggers:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
      - [**Upgrading:** Existing voice-only agents (e.g., Eleven Labs) to video.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
      - [**POCs:** Building proof-of-concepts for leadership or pilots.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=1382.0)
      - [**Mandates:** Board-level directives to evaluate new AI tools.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=1456.0)
  - [**Conclusion:** These triggers are not scalable. Content must proactively educate the market on what's possible.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)

### Competitive Landscape & Differentiators

  - [**vs. Animar (NOM):**](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=2144.0)
      - [**Tavus Advantages:** More advanced, usable features (memory, function calling, knowledge base) that are still in early, buggy stages at Animar.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=2144.0)
      - [**Animar Advantages:** Better lip-sync fidelity, easier 0-to-1 onboarding, and instant custom avatar creation from a single picture.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=2260.0)
  - [**vs. HeyGen & Synthesia:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=2376.0)
      - [**Key Differentiator:** Tavus is real-time and conversational; HeyGen/Synthesia are static and asynchronous.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=2376.0)
      - [**Tavus Advantages:** Built for large-scale, high-concurrency use cases with reliable support.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=2412.0)
      - [**Competitor Limitations:** HeyGen's real-time product has hard limits and poor support; Synthesia is a niche SaaS platform for L\&D.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=2412.0)

### Implementation Hurdles & Content Opportunities

  - [**Hurdle 1: Technical Resources Required**](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=2660.0)
      - [Tavus is API-first, requiring internal engineers.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=2660.0)
      - [**Content Opportunity:** Create programmatic "how-to" guides for specific use cases (e.g., "Build a healthcare AI agent").](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=2993.0)
  - [**Hurdle 2: Advanced Prompt Engineering Needed**](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=2702.0)
      - [Effective personas require robust, multi-page prompts, not simple one-liners.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=2702.0)
      - [**Content Opportunity:** Develop guides on prompt structuring and create a public glossary for Tavus-specific terminology.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=2918.0)

### Customer Proof & ROI

  - [**Key Value Buckets:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=3098.0)
      - [**Data Collection:** Increased talk time and perception model data (e.g., eye contact, facial expressions) for better insights.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=3098.0)
      - [**User Experience:** Higher engagement, comfort, and completion rates.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=3148.0)
      - [**Efficiency & Cost Savings:** Automating repetitive tasks (e.g., Mayo Clinic's virtual patient assistant).](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=3189.0)
  - [**Content Strategy:** Use these value buckets as a framework, contextualizing them for different industries.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=3228.0)
  - [**Status:** Jared will share data snippets; Tavus is working with Verbatim on a monthly cadence of formal case studies.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=3034.0)

### Messaging Guardrails

  - [**Keywords to Use Strategically:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=3287.0)
      - [**"Avatar":** Use for search intent, but reframe its meaning to include Tavus's conversational intelligence.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=3319.0)
      - [**"AI Companion":** Use for PALS-related search, but avoid NSFW connotations.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=3519.0)
  - [**Keywords to Avoid:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=3287.0)
      - [**"Deepfake":** Attracts the wrong ICP.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=3388.0)
  - [**Preferred Terminology:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=3546.0)
      - [**"AI Assistant" / "AI Video Assistant":** More professional and aligned with enterprise use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=3546.0)
  - [**Legal & Ethical Considerations:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=3626.0)
      - [**Custom Avatars:** Requires user consent.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=3657.0)
      - [**Celebrity Cloning:** Requires estate permission.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=3716.0)
      - [**Content Strategy:** Include disclaimers on consent and legal use to reinforce an ethical stance.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=3815.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tavus Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=3891.0)
      - [Review GrowthX's "Company Brief," "Audience & Personas," and "Writing Guidelines" documents.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=3891.0)
      - [Provide feedback, focusing on refining the ICPs and adding a glossary of Tavus-specific terms.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=4050.0)
      - [Share the slide deck with ROI data snippets.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=3034.0)
      - [Share API documentation for technical context.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=2955.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=3891.0)
      - [Absorb all feedback and documentation.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=3891.0)
      - [Present the formal content strategy to Tavus later this week.](https://fathom.video/share/Xg-n8SLEd1Lr6UgXZc9GE7tPLCQMEo3z?tab=summary&timestamp=3891.0)
